articles.title: Mamata Banerjee's Toughest Political Test Yet? TMC Rebels Make Their Move
articles.description: A group of 19 TMC MPs are all set to ask the Speaker to recognise their faction as the real party. If this happens, Mamata Banerjee might find herself out of the party she founded. This has also raised questions about who will get the party's ₹220 crore assets.

articles.title: Indian-origin convict gets 34-year prison term in UK over rape, kidnapping and torture
articles.description: An Indian-origin man has been jailed for 34 years in the UK after being convicted of kidnapping, torturing and raping a 24-year-old woman in a case police described as "unimaginable" in its brutality.

articles.title: CUET PG 2026: NTA Clarifies No Score Normalisation For Rescheduled Exams
articles.description: NTA has clarified that every candidate's score is calculated based on the marks obtained in the examination, and no normalisation process is used.

articles.description: SpaceX Goes Public: Elon Musk Says Science Fiction Will Become Reality

articles.title: Seeing these strange signs at home? These may be signs of a cockroach infestation
articles.description: Cockroaches are masters of disguise, often signaling their presence through subtle clues before being seen. Homeowners should be aware of musty odors, small black droppings, brown egg capsules, wall smears, damaged packaging, and daytime sightings as key indicators of an infestation.

articles.title: Sew far, so good: Why the younger generation is turning to sewing and upcycling
articles.description: From Instagram inspiration to hands-on workshops, the younger generation is rediscovering sewing as a form of self-expression and mindfulness.

articles.title: US-Iran peace deal likely in Geneva on June 14: Check 5 key agenda points
articles.description: Nuclear limits, sanctions relief and Hormuz reopening headline a possible US-Iran breakthrough.

articles.title: Drishyam 3 OTT Release Date: When and where to watch Mohanlal starrer thriller drama

Fans' wait will soon be over as the highly anticipated Mohanlal starrer thriller drama will soon arrive on OTT.

articles.title: 'In National Interest': 20 Rebel MPs To Meet Lok Sabha Speaker To Stake Claim As 'Asli TMC', Back NDA
articles.description: A faction of around 20 rebel TMC MPs has announced their support for the BJP-led NDA, citing national interest. Suspended TMC leader Riju Dutta indicated that a meeting with Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla is planned.

articles.title: Saudi Arabia to require Premium Residency holders to obtain dedicated work permits
articles.description: Saudi Arabia's Premium Residency holders must now secure a dedicated work permit via the Qiwa digital platform, costing SR100. This new requirement is part of broader labor market updates, including clarified rules for training contracts and resignations. Visa amendments necessitate cancellation and reissuance, with fees payable through various digital methods.

articles.title: IND vs AFG ODIs: Spotlight on Rohit Sharma as World Cup auditions begin for 2027
articles.description: Rohit Sharma faces an audition for his ODI future, needing to prove his fitness and form ahead of the next World Cup. Captain Shubman Gill grapples with selection decisions, potentially looking beyond the veteran. The series against Afghanistan also serves as a platform to test new batting combinations with Virat Kohli sidelined.

articles.title: Life lesson of the day by Gregory Peck: ‘Inside of all the makeup and the character... it’s you’ To Kill a Mockingbird actor on the power of authenticity in an appearance-obsessed world
articles.description: Gregory Peck's iconic portrayal of Atticus Finch highlighted the power of integrity and empathy over outward appearances. His philosophy, captured in a memorable quote, emphasizes that audiences connect with the genuine human response to life's challenges, not just the performance or persona.
